prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on molecular oxygen (O₂) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state), open-shell UKS. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz file at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz (single-point, not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy = true.

Results:
- HOMO energy: −8.8739616 eV
- LUMO energy: −3.5859031 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 5.2880586 eV
- Total energy: −150.38872 Hartree (−4092.2855 eV)

The degenerate HOMO/HOMO−1 pair (both at −8.8740 eV) and degenerate LUMO/LUMO+1 pair (both at −3.5859 eV) correctly reflect the π* degeneracy of O₂'s triplet state.

CLI invocation: cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 3 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz
